finding_results.notes: Replaced checklist-style 'First/Second/Agreed' structure with a pressure-true negotiation that preserves the same four boundaries while separating idiolects: Elsie leads with concrete household-risk framing and self-revision; Noreen responds with pivoting cadence (ironic humor to defiance to tenderness). summary: Revised the dawn terms exchange to maintain continuity constraints and all original boundaries while strengthening voice separation, colloquial pressure cadence, and anti-transcript dialogue flow.
